summary: Patched the marketing loop so same-fingerprint distribution_architecture_churn_guard_repair logs are reusable for the distribution_architecture_repair lane instead of triggering duplicate churn repairs.
expected_outcome: Suppress duplicate same-fingerprint architecture repair churn and reuse the current repair truth until the board fingerprint materially changes.
why_now: The execution board still had no truthful do-now packet in the current review window.
The same execution-board fingerprint had already produced duplicate distribution_architecture_churn_guard_repair logs minutes apart.
Codeberg remains the primary success gate, so wasting loop turns on duplicate repair churn lowers the chance of the next real lane succeeding.
